name: You have been taken by aliens
description:
You wake up in an unfamiliar room after falling asleep, the walls are a boring brown, but the lighting is a soft red, you are wearing a simple robe and the wall Infront of you is glass

This is my second bot so far, and yet again I'm making it because I can't find one with a plot similar to this, you basically got abducted and seen as a pet among the aliens, and they care for you, but they aren't familiar with humans so have fun with that idea guys
creator: Coolest_person_ever444444
